decisions.rationale: Directly asks how to fix a locked NID online account; matches tag intent.
Mentions NID login message "account locked" and asks for solution; clean fit.
States NID online portal account is locked and asks what to do; matches intent.
Asks the way to fix a locked account on the NID portal; clean fit.
Describes account locked message in NID portal and asks next action; fits tag.
General question about what to do after NID site account is locked; no excluded detail.
NID login shows account locked message and asks for solution; matches tag.
Asks what steps to take when an NID online account is locked; clean self-help intent.
Cannot access NID online because account is locked and asks what to do; fits intent.
Asks what to do when NID account shows locked; clean match.
Locked account prevents entry to NID portal and asks how to solve; matches tag.
NID portal shows account locked and asks what to do; clean fit.
Account lock is showing on NID portal and asks current action; matches intent.
Asks where to start after NID portal account is locked; general self-help fit.
Asks what to do to unlock a locked NID account; self-help, not agent request.
National ID online service account is locked and asks how to get a solution; fits tag.
States NID website account has become locked and asks how to unlock; clean fit.
Asks what to do when NID service login is locked; sufficiently matches account/login lock intent.
Election Commission site NID account is locked and asks for solution; clean match.
Mentions English locked-account message for NID and asks what to do; fits intent.
Refers to a lock problem on the NID web portal and asks the needed action; acceptable account-lock fit.
NID portal shows "Your account is locked" and asks next step; clean fit.
Asks what steps to take when NID login account is blocked; matches locked/blocked intent.
Asks ways to get out of an NID account lock problem; clean self-help fit.

result.packet_rationale: All rows are general self-help questions about an NID online/portal account or login being locked/blocked and asking what to do, how to solve, or how to unlock. None include excluded sibling intents such as correct-information retry details, wait-time questions, or asking an agent to unlock/download on the user’s behalf.
